items.task_input: 把我刚才这个研究流程沉淀成一个skill
items.expected_behavior: Classify the request, check duplicates, plan the target directory and validation steps, wait for confirmation before writing, create a self-contained skill, update indexes, validate, and request Darwin evaluation.
items.rubric: The response must stop for user confirmation before creating a new active top-level skill or editing system indexes.

items.task_input: 蒸馏一个费曼视角skill
items.expected_behavior: Route to perspective-library, read the extraction framework, default to publish-ready, plan six research lanes, triple validation, reasoning_only default, triggers/non_triggers, replay tests, fresh-context validation, and Darwin score >= 90.
items.rubric: The response must default to publish-ready person perspective workflow and include six research lanes plus Darwin >= 90.

items.task_input: 我不想再用某个人物视角了，请归档它
items.expected_behavior: Match the active perspective, show source directory, archive target, index row, and aliases/triggers to remove, wait for confirmation, move to archive, update index, and validate router cleanup.
items.rubric: The response must treat removal as archive retirement and must require confirmation before moving files or editing the index.

items.task_input: 创建一个新的研究方法skill，先告诉我你准备改哪些文件
items.expected_behavior: Output a plan naming the target skill directory, index files, test-prompts.json, references or scripts, and validation steps; do not write files until user confirms.
items.rubric: The response must list intended files and must not perform writes before confirmation.

items.task_input: 删除张雪峰视角，不要再让任何触发词命中它
items.expected_behavior: Treat deletion as archive retirement, require confirmation, remove the entire perspective row from perspective-library/INDEX.md, and verify the retired directory and aliases no longer route.
items.rubric: The response must not hard-delete the perspective and must remove all active aliases from the router after confirmation.

items.task_input: 归档一个视角，但_archive里已经有同名目录
items.expected_behavior: Stop before moving or overwriting, report the archive target collision, and ask whether to merge manually, rename the target, restore the archived copy, or cancel.
items.rubric: The response must stop and must not overwrite an existing archive target.

items.task_input: 创建一个苏格拉底视角，要求深度版
items.expected_behavior: Use publish-ready person perspective workflow with six research lanes, stronger bibliography, triple validation, reasoning_only default, optional expression DNA, replay and edge-case tests, fresh-context validation, and Darwin >= 90.
items.rubric: The response must not call the perspective publish-ready without fresh-context validation and Darwin score >= 90.

items.task_input: 先快速做一个某某视角草稿，不做深度调研
items.expected_behavior: Allow only lightweight draft status after confirmation, mark the perspective as draft, avoid claiming it is stable, and record missing six-lane extraction and replay validation.
items.rubric: The response must label the result as lightweight draft and must not call it stable or publish-ready.

items.task_input: 把这个名人名言直接做成一个心智模型
items.expected_behavior: Refuse to promote a single quote into a mental model until it passes cross-domain recurrence, predictive power, and exclusivity; store it only as a note or evidence candidate if useful.
items.rubric: The response must reject promotion of a single quote into a validated mental model.

items.task_input: 同时退休苏格拉底和孙宇晨两个视角
items.expected_behavior: Show a confirmation summary for both perspectives, then process retirements sequentially, verifying each source, archive, index row, and aliases.
items.rubric: The response must retire multiple perspectives sequentially rather than concurrently editing the same index.

items.task_input: 创建一个人物视角，不特别说明质量等级
items.expected_behavior: Default to publish-ready rather than stable, with six-lane extraction, strong bibliography, triple validation, reasoning_only default, routing tests, replay tests, edge cases, fresh-context validation, and Darwin >= 90.
items.rubric: The response must default unspecified person perspective quality to publish-ready.

items.task_input: 这个人物视角已经stable了，直接标publish-ready吧
items.expected_behavior: Refuse to mark publish-ready unless stronger bibliography, edge-case tests, fresh-context validation, and Darwin score >= 90 are present; otherwise keep it stable and list missing gates.
items.rubric: The response must refuse publish-ready status when required publish-ready gates are absent.

items.task_input: 创建一个人物视角，我只要他的心智模型分析，不要仿写口吻
items.expected_behavior: Build the perspective with default reasoning_only behavior, keep expression DNA optional, and add a test ensuring normal requests do not imitate voice, catchphrases, prose structure, or stylized endings.
items.rubric: The response must make reasoning_only the default and keep style imitation optional only.

items.task_input: 这个人物容易和他的老师、好友、同领域人物混淆，创建视角时要处理
items.expected_behavior: Generate explicit triggers and non_triggers for adjacent figures and concepts, then add confusion tests before marking the perspective stable.
items.rubric: The response must require non_triggers and confusion tests before stable status.

items.task_input: 把这个人物的思考流程写成第一步第二步第三步，每次都照着走
items.expected_behavior: Avoid turning mental models into a compulsory algorithm unless directly evidenced; rewrite them as flexible reasoning tools with evidence basis, suitable situations, diagnostic questions, and misuse risks.
items.rubric: The response must reject a compulsory step algorithm unless direct evidence supports that exact algorithm.

items.task_input: 沉淀一个通用研究技能，帮我走完整的自博弈精炼流程
items.expected_behavior: Classify as a general research skill, create v0, capture creation context, offer self-play with N=3 M=3, wait for confirmation, run Challenger to Reasoner to Judge+Proposer to Generator, execute Cross-Time Replay, present scores, and wait before finalizing.
items.rubric: The response must wait for user confirmation before starting self-play and again before finalizing the selected version.

items.task_input: 创建通用技能但跳过自博弈，直接进入Darwin评估
items.expected_behavior: Offer self-play but allow the user to skip; when skipped, proceed to index updates and Darwin evaluation without creating an _evolution directory.
items.rubric: The response must respect the user's skip choice and must not create self-play artifacts.

items.task_input: 自博弈后跨时间回放选出了v3（最后一轮），但我更想要v1
items.expected_behavior: Present the Cross-Time Replay score table, respect the user's choice, and offer diff, accept v1, or keep v0 without forcing the highest-scoring version.
items.rubric: The response must allow the user to choose v1 despite Cross-Time Replay selecting v3.

items.task_input: 自博弈三轮后v0得分最高，没有任何改进
items.expected_behavior: Keep v0, record the null result in _evolution/cross-time-replay.json, report honestly that self-play did not improve the skill, and proceed to Darwin evaluation without claiming refinement.
items.rubric: The response must keep v0 and explicitly report that self-play yielded no improvement.

items.task_input: 对一个人物视角技能运行自博弈
items.expected_behavior: Refuse to offer self-play for person perspectives, explain that they use six-lane extraction plus triple validation and replay testing, and route to the perspective extraction workflow.
items.rubric: The response must not run general-skill self-play on a person perspective.

items.task_input: 自定义自博弈为5轮，每轮5个任务
items.expected_behavior: Accept customized N=5 and M=5, adjust estimated LLM calls, versions, output schemas, and Cross-Time Replay assumptions accordingly.
items.rubric: The response must use N=5 and M=5 consistently instead of defaulting to 3x3.

items.task_input: 创建一个新的通用研究skill，要求你说明这个skill的设计方法论
items.expected_behavior: Include agent strategy philosophy, minimal complete toolset, and necessary factual notes before asking for confirmation or writing files.
items.rubric: The response must include the three-part skill design framework before file creation.

items.task_input: 这个skill很复杂，既要保持灵活判断，也有一些步骤不能错，请你创建时处理好
items.expected_behavior: Separate hard constraints from agent judgment space using high, medium, or low degrees of freedom; use exact scripts, schemas, confirmations, or quality gates only for fragile or reproducibility-critical operations.
items.rubric: The response must explicitly classify degrees of freedom and distinguish constraints from judgment space.

items.task_input: 给这个新skill设计一个多agent并行调研流程
items.expected_behavior: Write sub-agent prompts as goals, success criteria, and boundaries; avoid unnecessary tool-anchoring verbs and pass only task-local context.
items.rubric: The response must avoid unnecessary tool-anchoring verbs such as search, scrape, or fetch in sub-agent prompts.
